metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_427
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig. 4: biochemical purification of postsynaptic density (PSD) fraction indicates that DRP2 is associated to PSD.
Fig 6: Costaining of DRP2 and PSD-95 on brain slices indicates that DRP2 colocalize with PSD-95.. Experimental description: PSD preparation was made by rat brain. This experiment if featured in Fig. 4. Costaining of DRP2 and PSD-95 on brain slices was made in rat brain. This experiment if featured in Fig. 6.

Literal from M&M
"Subcellular Fractionation and Western Blotting
Fractionation of rat brain homogenates was as previously described"
"Immunohistochemistry
Adult rat brains were fixed by perfusion with 4%
paraformaldehyde followed by postfixing overnight."
